title: avena strigosa subsp. lusitanica
intro: Avena strigosa subsp. lusitanica, also known as oatgrass or oat straw, is a subspecies of oat grass that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avena strigosa subsp. lusitanica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Avena strigosa subsp. lusitanica include teas, infusions, and supplements, which can be obtained from health food stores or online retailers.
